zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Peabody於1522年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾諾瑟利時，他的父親John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody22歲，母親Agnes Basset Wyllie20歲。他於1542年與Agnes Allen在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1586年1月23日在英國林可爾史爾阿什比享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 帕瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Peabody于1522年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾諾瑟利时，他的父亲John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody22岁，母亲Agnes Basset Wyllie20岁。他于1542年与Agnes Allen在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1586年1月23日在英国林可爾史爾阿什比享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 帕瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Peabody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname ‘peacock-body’, from Middle English pe, pey, pay (Old English pēa) ‘peacock’ + body, perhaps for a vain person who dressed ostentatiously. Compare Pea , Peacock .

History: The prominent financier and philanthropist George Peabody was born 1795 in South Danvers, now Peabody, MA. His first ancestor in America was Francis Peabody, who emigrated from England in 1635 and settled at Topsfield, MA.

variants.name: Pea
meanings: nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Peabody was born in 1522, in Noseley, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody, was 22 and his mother, Agnes Basset Wyllie, was 20. He married Agnes Allen in 1542, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 23 January 1586, in Ashby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ashby Parva, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Peabody est né en 1522, à Noseley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes Basset Wyllie, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Allen en 1542, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1586, à Ashby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ashby Parva, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Januar 1586 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Ashby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Ashby Parva, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Allen nel 1542, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Peabodyが1522年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアノセリーで生まれた時，父John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybodyは22歳，母Agnes Basset Wyllieは20歳であった。1542年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでAgnes Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1586年1月23日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアシュビーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー パーヴァにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Peabody(이)가 1522년 영국 레이스스터실르 노셀이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Basset Wyllie(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1542년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Agnes Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 1월 23일 영국 링코실르 애스h비에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 파르바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Peabody nasceu em 1522, em Noseley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Basset Wyllie, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Allen em 1542, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1586, em Ashby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashby Parva, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Peabody родился в 1522 г. в местности носели, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams Peabody   ^  Paybody было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Basset Wyllie, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Allen в 1542 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 января 1586 г. в местности ашби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ашби парва, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Allen en 1542, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1586, en Ashby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Ashby Parva, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
